reference.title: Milestone Status Values
reference.shortdesc: Reference for the five milestone status values and their effect on the project health score.

row.entry: Identified but not yet active. Included in the total milestone count.
On the active roadmap. Work toward this outcome has started or is scheduled.
Active work toward achieving this outcome is in progress.
Outcome achieved. Portfolio Manager records the completion date.

section.title: Milestone Score Behavior
section.p: The milestone score component is calculated as:
section.codeblock: (milestones with Done status) ÷ (all milestones except Cancelled) × 40
section.p: A project with no milestones earns 0 milestone points. To reach the maximum portfolio score of 100, define milestones and advance them to Done as work progresses.
